content: Create SARIMAX command file structure and imports
Install arima npm package if not already installed
Implement SARIMAX model integration for trend forecasting
Add historical data preprocessing for SARIMAX input
Implement chart/plotting functionality similar to original command
Fix trend score filtering that was preventing forecasts from displaying
Verify forecasts are visible in generated HTML charts and JSON data
Resolve SARIMAX collinearity issues with exogenous variables
